Name: Little Star Candy Vakarine
Acquire Bonus: Star Point Every time Ice element fellows (Except this unit) using skill, grant 'Star Point' equal to half of that fellow's rank. (Max 100 stacks) 'Star Point' will be reduced 1 stack every second and heal player for 2% HP and 1% SP When stack reach maximum, grant 15s buff to player and all fellows that increase damage by 7.5% (Except Demigod Fellow) You cannot stack 'Star Point' while this buff is active.
Leader Skill (Demigod Only): 100% dmg Base Stat Increase: HP +60%, Defense +50%, Atk +25%
Basic Attack: Help Me! Dionys! CD 15s Attack target area with Dionys's doll. Deal 3 hits for total of 1676%
Skill 1: Sugar Crystal CD 20s Summon Sugar Crystal that shoot crystal missile every 2s. Up to 6 times. Each crystal missile dealing 165% damage and cause 'sticky' on hit for 3s [Sticky] Movement speed -10% , Atk -2%. Both effect can be stackable Atk down only damage that apply to player and your fellows.
Skill 2: Star Circle CD 15s Summon star magic circle at enemy position. Dealing 1117% damage and 'Stun' enemy. After that, magic circle persist for 10s. Dealing 223% damage per second to enemy inside area. Also grant player and fellow 15% attack speed & movement speed buff in that area
Skill 3: Fantastic Show [Unlock at Rank 1] CD 120s 'Stun' all enemies around you and enter 'Awakening' state for 30s Emit dance floor around her for 10s. Dealing 511% damage every 2s. Which reduce Hit Rate and Penetration Rate of enemy hit by 10% for 3s. [Awakening] Skill damage & DoT damage increase by 200%. Recover 7.5% HP every 5 second.
Awaken Skill: Lodestar Doll fell from Help Me! Dionys! will persist in that area for 10s. Dealing 73% (+24% at Rank 9) per second to enemies around it [Max 121%]
Rank Unlock Effect: Joyful Kid Max HP +10% All damage from this unit has 35% chance to 'Crystalize' enemy. Dealing 87% Ice damage per second for 5s. After 'Crystailize' duration expires, has 22% (+2% per rank) chance to 'Freeze' enemy. Cannot Crystalize enemy that already be crystalized.
Tierlist: Super Star Point Using Sugar Crystal will grant 'Star Point' too. While Sugar Crystal persists, every Star Point reduction will cause crystal to shoot extra missile. Dealing 66%(+6% per rank, +22% at rank 9) damage. If this missile cannot target enemy in 7-8m range. Heal 5% HP instead.
Required Mats for Max Rank: Cheerleading Grant 37.5s (+2.5s per rank) buff to owner and all fellow after using Fantastic Show - Demigod & Fire unit : Increase damage by 10% - Owner and other fellows except yourself : Increase damage by 50%
column16: Asteroid Increase number of crystal missile per 'Sugar Crystal' casting by 1 (+1 per rank) Also reduce interval time per crystal missile fire by 1s. While Sugar Crystal persists, grant player buff reduce damage received by 6.5% (+1.5% per rank)
column17: Sticky Feet Star Circle also slow enemy inside the area by 25% All Ice fellows attack has 5% (+2% per rank) chance to 'sticky' enemy for 3s. +1 Acc Slot +1 Acc Slot Alternate costume unlocked. Upgrade all skill damage +1 Acc Slot
